name: toast
label: Toast
description: A global notification stack with progress bars, hover-to-pause, and four types. Trigger from JS, Blade sessions, or Livewire events.

props.name: duration
props.description: How long each toast stays visible, in milliseconds.

usage: Place <x-toast /> once in your layout. Then call toast('Saved!', 'success') in JS, dispatch a 'pop-toast' Livewire event, or flash session('toast').
